Properties.Description: Finalize analytics records after buffer window
Daily reconciliation job for call analytics and agent performance
Allow QuickSight to read call analytics data

Properties.AlarmDescription: Alert when agent-performance-dlq-processor Lambda has errors
Alert when agent-performance-dlq-processor Lambda is throttled
Alert when agent-performance-dlq-processor Lambda p99 duration exceeds 240000ms (~80% of timeout)
Alert when finalize-analytics Lambda has errors
Alert when finalize-analytics Lambda is throttled
Alert when finalize-analytics Lambda p99 duration exceeds 48000ms (~80% of timeout)
Alert when reconciliation-job Lambda has errors
Alert when reconciliation-job Lambda is throttled
Alert when reconciliation-job Lambda p99 duration exceeds 720000ms (~80% of timeout)
Alert when reconcile-analytics Lambda has errors
Alert when reconcile-analytics Lambda is throttled
Alert when reconcile-analytics Lambda p99 duration exceeds 720000ms (~80% of timeout)

QuickSightSetupInstructions.Description: Steps to create QuickSight analytics dashboard

Fn::Join:
To create QuickSight dashboard:
1. Enable QuickSight in AWS Console
2. Create Data Source: DynamoDB table

4. Create Analysis with metrics: sentiment, callCategory, duration, audioQuality
5. Publish Dashboard

QuickSightRoleArn.Description: IAM Role ARN for QuickSight data source
